# Anumiti - India's AI Infrastructure for Compliance & Document Intelligence

## About
Anumiti (anumiti.com) provides two products:
- KAVACH: DPDP compliance platform for Indian businesses
- NETRA: Document intelligence API for Indian documents in 22 languages

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://anumiti.com
- KAVACH Product: https://anumiti.com/kavach
- NETRA Product: https://anumiti.com/netra
- DPDP Act Guide: https://anumiti.com/guides/dpdp-act-2023
- DPDP Rules Guide: https://anumiti.com/guides/dpdp-rules-2025
- Blog: https://anumiti.com/blog
- API Playground: https://anumiti.com/playground
